appraisal_events.evidence: les histoires trop facilement trouvées drôles par notre camarade étaient des histoires de Bloch père... l'homme « tout à fait curieux » était toujours un de ses amis... (ce que Bloch avait été pour moi) qui méprise le Musset...
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch is locally lowered as derivative and fashion-driven: his jokes come from his father and his judgments of friends and literary tastes appear second-hand and unstable.

status_effects.explanation: His authority as a witty arbiter and tastemaker is weakened by being shown as derivative and capricious.
